description_long: This sculpture depicts a majestic angelic figure with large, outstretched wings and flowing robes, standing atop a rectangular pedestal. The angel's right arm is raised, with the index finger pointing upward, while the left arm is bent, holding a draped cloth or possibly a symbolic object close to the chest. The facial features are serene and the head is adorned with a wreath or crown. The wings are highly detailed, with visible feather textures and a dramatic span that extends well beyond the figure's shoulders. The surface of the sculpture has a metallic, dark finish, giving it a solemn and dignified appearance. The base is simple and solid, providing stability and prominence to the figure above.
description: A dark metallic angel sculpture with outstretched wings, raised arm, and flowing robes, standing on a rectangular pedestal. The figure exudes a solemn, dignified presence with detailed feathered wings and a serene expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angel's face, outstretched wings, raised right arm, and draped robes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the angel, the upward-pointing arm, and the depth of the wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full span and feather detail of the wings, with the back of the robe and pedestal visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the angel's profile, the raised arm, and the curvature of the wings.
attribute_subject_matter: angelic human figure with outstretched wings
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is neutral and does not indicate a specific setting.
